raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command to remove carriage return at end of each line in file and display result with printable characters or backslash escapes. Use tr -d '\r' or sed 's/\r$//'. To display printable or escapes: use cat -v or od -c. Maybe use sed -e 's/\r$//' file | cat -v. So command: sed 's/\r$//' system/folder3/temp/temp1/text1.txt | cat -v.
